novelty: measured-Tc-zero (Po is radioactive — no synthesis path; DFT-only completes group-16 series 4/4)
purpose: Heaviest group-16 X-analog: completes H3X group-16 series {O, S, Se, Te, Po} (4 of 4 LANDED via this pipeline, S=baseline). Tests λ-vs-ω_log limit at heaviest X — ω_log collapses but λ inflates.
system: H3Po cubic Im-3m BCC primitive (1 Po + 3 H = 4 atoms), celldm=6.236 bohr (a≈3.300 Å), PBE PAW

method.scf: ecutwfc=60 Ry, ecutrho=600 Ry, 24x24x24 k-grid, MP smearing degauss=0.02 Ry
method.phonon: ph.x DFPT ldisp 6x6x6 q (16 irreducible, weights [4,12,12,12,12,12,8,8,12,12,12,8,12,8,12,4]=160), electron_phonon='simple', el_ph_sigma 0.005-0.050 Ry (10 broadenings)
method.qblocks_parsed: 10/16 (partial — chain terminated; values reflect partial-BZ moments)
method.moments: BZ-weighted lambda + lambda-weighted log-average omega_log; Allen-Dynes Tc with mu*=0.10 and 0.13

ALIGNN_per_cand.pathology_note: ALIGNN negative-lambda pathology (-0.21) → AD-from-a2F collapses. Heavy-X out-of-distribution. RTSC.md §9.7 wall.

group_16_completion_marker.trend: λ inflates with heavier X (3.0+), but ω_log collapses (mass-trace ω∝1/√M_X). Net Tc decreases. H3S = sweet spot.

honest_observations: Lowest Tc in group-16 — confirms ω_log collapse dominates λ growth at heaviest X.
Tc broadening-insensitive (47-48K across 4 broadenings); provisional 10/16 q-block coverage — magnitude stable, ranking robust.
Po radioactive (α-emitter, t½=138d for 210Po) — no realistic synthesis. Pipeline-completion marker only.
r4_invariant: absorbed=false · gate_type=simulation-only-prediction · domain=material. R4 Pattern 1 + Pattern 2 preserved.
